nasb.text: Thus let all Your enemies perish, O Lord; But let those who love Him be like the rising of the sun in its might.” And the land was undisturbed for forty years.

esv.text: “So may all your enemies perish, O Lord! But your friends be like the sun as he rises in his might.” And the land had rest for forty years.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊，願你所有的仇敵都這樣滅亡； 願愛他的人像太陽出現，大有能力。” 於是國中太平了四十年。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊， 愿你的敌人都像西西拉一样灭亡！ 愿爱你的人如升起的太阳， 光辉熠熠！” 此后，以色列安享太平四十年。
